failure_signature: Browser CDP connection failed when trying to attach to Chrome instance — browser not launched with remote-debugging-port flag
remedy: browser-cdp should check if a debuggable browser instance exists before connecting. If not found, offer to launch one automatically with correct flags.

failure_signature: Web search API returned rate limit exceeded error after multiple consecutive queries in a single session
remedy: Implement query batching and caching within the skill. Warn user when approaching rate limits and suggest consolidating searches.

failure_signature: xlsx skill threw error when trying to write a spreadsheet with cells containing mixed unicode characters and emoji
remedy: xlsx skill should handle unicode normalization before writing cells. Test with diverse character sets including emoji, CJK, and RTL scripts.
